name: UAC Bypass Attempt via Windows Directory Masquerading
description: A User Account Control (UAC) bypass attempt has been detected by executing a process from a masqueraded Windows directory, indicating potential privilege escalation.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the process was created.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the UAC bypass attempt occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was run.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the executable created from the masqueraded directory.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to launch the process.

parameters.name: IntegrityLevel
parameters.description: The integrity level of the process (expected 'High').

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
